name: Hearty Vegetable Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven, brown the ground beef.
2. Add onion and garlic. Cook until the onion is tender; drain.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except frozen vegetables. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low; cover. Simmer for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add frozen vegetables; cook for 10 to 15 minutes or until vegetables and barley are tender.
6. If the soup becomes too thick upon standing, add additional water.
NOTE: To use Quick QUAKER Barley, substitute 2/3 cup quick barley for medium barley and decrease water to 6 cups. Cook ground beef, onion, and garlic as directed above. Add remaining ingredients including frozen vegetables. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; cover. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes or until vegetables and barley are tender.
